sentence_reviews.text: A joint distribution is factorized into a sequence of conditional next-step predictions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction, probability and generative modeling foundation; landing page lines 21-29 and 45-48.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is the standard chain-rule/autoregressive factorization.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Autoregressive / next-step prediction is to connect Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling to downstream capabilities including Autoregressive decoding, Recurrent neural networks, Decoder-only causal transformers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML landing page lines 45-48; BERT abstract lines 37-39 contrasts bidirectional pretraining context with other language representation models.
sentence_reviews.notes: Autoregressive objectives clearly support generative sequence models; the exact downstream graph list is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction, probability/generative ML source lines 21-29 and 45-48.
sentence_reviews.notes: Autoregressive decoding directly samples next steps from autoregressive conditionals.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML landing page lines 45-48 describes modern and traditional ML coverage.
sentence_reviews.notes: RNNs can implement autoregressive sequence models, but RNNs do not inherently require this objective.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML landing page lines 45-48 describes modern ML coverage; no direct decoder-only transformer evidence was inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Causal decoder language models are commonly trained with next-token objectives, but the inspected source location is indirect.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are plausible; the surrogate-objective caveat is not directly supported by inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Self-supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Next-step prediction on raw sequences can be self-supervised, but autoregressive modeling can also be supervised or likelihood-based.

sentence_reviews.text: Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.notes: The objective defines a generative model over sequences via conditional distributions.

sentence_reviews.text: Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML landing page lines 45-48 describes broad traditional/modern ML coverage.
sentence_reviews.notes: Next-step prediction requires ordered sequence structure.

sentence_reviews.text: Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition is explicitly a factorization of a joint distribution into conditional probabilities.

edge_reviews.notes: Self-supervised data-derived targets are common in language modeling but not inherent to all autoregressive objectives.
Autoregressive conditionals define a generative distribution over sequences.
Sequential ordering is required for next-step prediction; common strength is defensible because the packet treats it as an added ingredient beyond self-supervision/generation.
Conditional and joint distributions are probability-theoretic objects; common strength may be understated but defensible in the graph's selected core dependencies.
